heading: Studies of effects of changes in approach to national dairy policy and fluid milk identity standards
label: 7984 Studies of effects of changes in approach to national dairy policy and fluid milk identity standards

children.text: terminating all Federal programs relating to price support and supply management for milk; and
granting the consent of Congress to cooperative efforts by States to manage milk prices and supply.

children.heading: Fluid milk identity standards
children.label: b Fluid milk identity standards
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a study of the effects of including in the standard of identity for fluid milk a required minimum protein content that is commensurate with the average nonfat solids content of bovine milk produced in the United States.

children.heading: Reports
children.label: c Reports
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report describing the results of the studies required by this section.May 13, 2002
